summary: Full E2E test of HealAI - Universal Health Navigator. All 24 backend pytest tests PASSED (100%). Frontend loads correctly across all 10 pages with working mode switcher (Human<->Animal), language switcher (EN/HI/KN), chat with emergency detection, cost estimator chart, hospitals, schemes eligibility, emergency page with 108, and more. Real LLM calls via Claude Sonnet 4.5 + Emergent LLM key work end-to-end (chat, symptoms, image/analyze, reports/upload).

minor.issue: matching_hospitals filter uses only city+hospital_type, not mode. For animal conditions (e.g. animal_vaccination) in Animal mode, human hospitals like Apollo/Manipal/Victoria still appear alongside the vet hospital. Consider filtering matching hospitals by mode (human->exclude veterinary; animal->only veterinary).

issues: 'Matching hospitals' section shows non-veterinary human hospitals for animal conditions (downstream of backend /api/cost/estimate not filtering by mode).

action_items: (Optional / minor) In backend server.py cost_estimate(), filter matching_hospitals by mode — infer mode from condition_key prefix (animal_/pet_/livestock_) or accept an explicit `mode` in CostEstimateRequest, then exclude veterinary (human mode) or require veterinary (animal mode).
critical_code_review_comments: server.py is 550 lines and still readable but could be split into routers (chat, cost, hospitals, schemes, reports, emergency, ayurveda) once it grows further.
/api/cost/estimate does not accept or enforce `mode`, leading to cross-category hospital matches (minor).

Good: MongoDB _id is consistently excluded via projections; pydantic models used; env-only config; LLM exceptions caught with graceful fallback; data-testid present on all interactive elements; CORS configured.
Good: Emergency detection is deterministic (keyword match) independent of LLM, which correctly short-circuits to the emergency banner in the UI.
seed_data_creation: Tests create/delete a TEST_user report in /api/reports (cleaned up within same test).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Pytest file at /app/backend/tests/backend_test.py covers all 18+ endpoints including real LLM calls (chat EN/HI, symptoms, image analysis, report extract). Uses PIL to generate a real JPEG with features per /app/image_testing.md. Total runtime ~70s. Frontend validated via Playwright on public URL. data-testid on all key elements (e.g., mode-human-btn, chat-input, chat-send-btn, condition-select, city-select, estimate-btn, scheme-s1..s8). Note: condition/city/hospital-type are Radix Select, not native — use page.click + option click (not select_option) in future playwright scripts.
